# Super Sweep: MCFS + Rosetta search over seeds

# Cell 1: Load
```{r}
library(rJava)
library(rmcfs)
library(R.ROSETTA)
library(caret)

# Load data
df <- read.csv("data/clean/train_data.csv",
  colClasses = "character",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Drop column ID
positions <- subset(df, select = -id)
```

# Cell 2: MCFS Params
```{r}
# ---- 1 ----
params_1_projections <- 1000
params_1_projectionSize <- 0.2

# ---- 2 ----
params_2_projections <- 1250
params_2_projectionSize <- 0.2

# ---- 3 ----
params_3_featureFreq <- 100
params_3_projectionSize <- 0.2

# ---- 4 ----
params_4_featureFreq <- 150
params_4_projectionSize <- 0.2

# ---- 5 ----
params_5_projections <- 1500
params_5_projectionSize <- 0.1

# ---- 6 ----
params_6_projections <- 1000
params_6_projectionSize <- 0.2
params_6_cutoffMethod <- "criticalAngle"

# ---- 7 ----
params_7_projections <- 1000
params_7_projectionSize <- 0.2
params_7_cutoffMethod <- "kmeans"

# ---- 8 ----
params_8_projections <- 1000
params_8_projectionSize <- 0.2
params_8_cutoffMethod <- "mean"

# Anchor parameters for every mcfs model
threadsNum <- 16
# the rest of the parameters dont pass, leave as default
```

# Cell 3: Rosetta Params
```{r}
# Johnson params to try
johnson_param1 <- list(
  Modulo = TRUE,
  BRT = TRUE,
  BRTprec = 0.7,
  Precompute = FALSE,
  Approximate = TRUE,
  Fraction = 1
)

johnson_param2 <- list(
  Modulo = TRUE,
  BRT = TRUE,
  BRTprec = 0.6,
  Precompute = FALSE,
  Approximate = TRUE,
  Fraction = 1
)

johnson_param3 <- list(
  Modulo = TRUE,
  BRT = TRUE,
  BRTprec = 0.5,
  Precompute = FALSE,
  Approximate = TRUE,
  Fraction = 1
)

johnson_param4 <- list(
  Modulo = TRUE,
  BRT = TRUE,
  BRTprec = 0.4,
  Precompute = FALSE,
  Approximate = TRUE,
  Fraction = 1
)

# Classifiers
classifier1 <- "StandardVoter"
classifier2 <- "ObjectTrackingVoter"

# Anchor parameters for every rosetta model
fixed_underSample <- FALSE
fixed_reducerDiscernibility <- "Object"
fixed_reducer <- "Johnson"
fixed_roc <- FALSE
```

# Cell 4: Implement Here
```{r}
# Helper: run one rosetta model, return accuracyMean
run_ros <- function(dat, jp, cl) {
  ros <- rosetta(dat,
    reducer               = fixed_reducer,
    JohnsonParam          = jp,
    reducerDiscernibility = fixed_reducerDiscernibility,
    discrete              = TRUE,
    classifier            = cl,
    underSample           = fixed_underSample,
    roc                   = fixed_roc
  )
  return(ros$quality$accuracyMean)
}

# Helper: run one MCFS config (output suppressed), return factor-encoded selected data
run_mcfs_select <- function(dat, cfg) {
  # Suppress Java-level stdout (mcfs prints via Java, bypassing R's sink)
  old_out <- .jfield("java/lang/System", "Ljava/io/PrintStream;", "out")
  null_stream <- .jnew(
    "java/io/PrintStream",
    .jcast(.jnew("java/io/ByteArrayOutputStream"), "java/io/OutputStream")
  )
  .jcall("java/lang/System", "V", "setOut", null_stream)
  on.exit(.jcall("java/lang/System", "V", "setOut", old_out), add = TRUE)

  if (cfg == 1) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_1_projections, projectionSize = params_1_projectionSize, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 2) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_2_projections, projectionSize = params_2_projectionSize, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 3) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, featureFreq = params_3_featureFreq, projectionSize = params_3_projectionSize, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 4) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, featureFreq = params_4_featureFreq, projectionSize = params_4_projectionSize, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 5) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_5_projections, projectionSize = params_5_projectionSize, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 6) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_6_projections, projectionSize = params_6_projectionSize, cutoffMethod = params_6_cutoffMethod, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else if (cfg == 7) {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_7_projections, projectionSize = params_7_projectionSize, cutoffMethod = params_7_cutoffMethod, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  } else {
    res <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(mcfs(class ~ ., dat, projections = params_8_projections, projectionSize = params_8_projectionSize, cutoffMethod = params_8_cutoffMethod, threadsNumber = threadsNum)))
  }

  sel <- res$RI[1:res$cutoff_value, ]
  out <- as.data.frame(dat[, colnames(dat) %in% c(sel$attribute, "class")])
  out[] <- lapply(out, as.factor)
  return(out)
}

# Grid search storage
results <- data.frame(
  seed = integer(),
  mcfs_config = character(),
  rosetta_config = character(),
  accuracy = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (seed in 1:25) {
  set.seed(seed)
  cat(sprintf("Seed %d/25\n", seed))

  for (mcfs_i in 1:8) {
    sel_data <- run_mcfs_select(positions, mcfs_i)
    mcfs_label <- paste0("mcfs", mcfs_i)

    acc_jp1_sv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param1, classifier1)
    acc_jp1_otv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param1, classifier2)
    acc_jp2_sv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param2, classifier1)
    acc_jp2_otv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param2, classifier2)
    acc_jp3_sv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param3, classifier1)
    acc_jp3_otv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param3, classifier2)
    acc_jp4_sv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param4, classifier1)
    acc_jp4_otv <- run_ros(sel_data, johnson_param4, classifier2)

    acc_vec <- c(
      acc_jp1_sv, acc_jp1_otv, acc_jp2_sv, acc_jp2_otv,
      acc_jp3_sv, acc_jp3_otv, acc_jp4_sv, acc_jp4_otv
    )
    ros_labels <- c(
      "jp1_sv", "jp1_otv", "jp2_sv", "jp2_otv",
      "jp3_sv", "jp3_otv", "jp4_sv", "jp4_otv"
    )

    for (k in seq_along(acc_vec)) {
      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        seed = seed,
        mcfs_config = mcfs_label,
        rosetta_config = ros_labels[k],
        accuracy = acc_vec[k],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}
```

# Cell 5: Results Summary
```{r}
# Summary table: 64 combos x (avg_acc, best_seed, best_seed_acc)
combo_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(
  split(results, list(results$mcfs_config, results$rosetta_config)),
  function(grp) {
    best_idx <- which.max(grp$accuracy)
    data.frame(
      combo = paste0(grp$mcfs_config[1], "_", grp$rosetta_config[1]),
      avg_acc = round(mean(grp$accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
      best_seed = grp$seed[best_idx],
      best_seed_acc = round(grp$accuracy[best_idx], 4),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
))

combo_summary <- combo_summary[order(-combo_summary$avg_acc), ]
rownames(combo_summary) <- NULL
print(combo_summary)
```
